title: 6H Histoire: Traces, conservation et mémoire
goal: Create the three complete isolated Svelte exercise records allocated to cluster H56-TRACES-MEMORY (SHS 22, SHS 23) using the finalized coverage matrix and quality contract. Implement the approved lenses construction=EX-0412, practice=EX-0413, transfer-diagnosis=EX-0414. Each record must have exercise.ts, a rigorous DESIGN.md, Prototype.svelte, and any owned assets.
acceptance: Exactly three catalog records are created in the exact authorized semantic folders ex-0412-history-traces-memory-construction/, ex-0413-history-traces-memory-practice/, ex-0414-history-traces-memory-transfer-diagnosis/, with immutable IDs EX-0412, EX-0413, EX-0414 and years ["6H"].
All metadata references H56-TRACES-MEMORY, objective codes SHS 22, SHS 23, the finalized source IDs and statement IDs, and tags program-per-6h plus exactly one lens tag.

Each DESIGN.md follows the complete template, distinguishes PER evidence from design interpretation, defines one observable objective, prerequisites, misconceptions/hypotheses, evidence, content model, accessibility, observation plan, findings, and promotion criteria.

The construction, practice, and transfer-diagnosis prototypes use meaningfully different concept-led loops rather than a common multiple-choice reskin; each is student-facing French and self-contained.

Every prototype implements introduction, active manipulation, submission/decision, specific explanatory feedback, scaffolded recovery or retry, continuation, and completion with at least three deliberate content variations.

Keyboard, pointer, and touch paths are present; correctness is not communicated by color alone; motion respects reduced-motion; the layout remains usable at 320px and does not require fine motor precision.

Every prototype implements the quality contract’s presentation-neutral smoke markers on visible enabled pupil controls and observable states; the markers support automated desktop-keyboard and 320px-touch paths through incorrect feedback, retry, correct continuation, and completion without providing a hidden test-only shortcut.
No prototype imports classroom or sibling-exercise code, performs network calls, persists pupil data, submits results, uses copied proprietary content, or claims pupil validation.
All three records remain status prototyping for independent review.
must_ask_if: The authoritative coverage matrix is missing, contradictory, or does not map this cluster to all listed statement IDs.
A proposed activity would present an unbanded end-of-Cycle-2 expectation as a mandatory 6H endpoint.
You need a network service, new dependency, copyrighted media, pupil data, persistence, or files outside the declared areas.
The three approved lenses cannot be made meaningfully distinct without changing the cluster boundary or product intent.
verify: cd experiments && SMOKE_EXERCISES=EX-0412,EX-0413,EX-0414 npm run test:smoke
